templates.name: Personal Finance Blogger Pitch
templates.use_for: Personal finance blogs, FIRE blogs, budgeting sites — audience actively interested in homebuying
subject_lines: Free mortgage affordability calculator for your readers
Quick question: do your readers know how much house they can afford?
Free embeddable tool for your homebuying guide
templates.short_version:
Hi [NAME],

I came across [SITE] and thought your readers would find this useful — a free mortgage affordability calculator widget they can use right on your site. No signup, no data collection, just a clean, mobile-friendly tool.

Embed: [EMBED_CODE]

Live preview: https://www.qfinhub.com/widgets/mortgage-affordability-embed

Would this be helpful for your readers?

Best,
Qasem Mohammed
QFINHUB
templates.longer_version:
Hi [NAME],

I've been reading [SITE] and really appreciate your [SPECIFIC_CONTENT_REFERENCE]. I wanted to share something that might complement your homebuying content.

I built a free mortgage affordability calculator widget that helps readers figure out how much house they can afford. It uses standard 28%/36% DTI lending guidelines and updates in real time as readers adjust income, debts, and down payment.

Key details:
• 100% free — no signup, no paid tiers
• No user data collected — all calculations in-browser
• Mobile responsive — works on any device
• Clean design that blends with most sites

Embed code:
[EMBED_CODE]

You can see it in action here: https://www.qfinhub.com/widgets/mortgage-affordability-embed

I built this as a genuinely useful free tool — no catch, no upsell. If you think it would add value for your readers, I'd be honored to have it on your site.

Thanks for your time,
Qasem Mohammed
QFINHUB
templates.follow_up:
Hi [NAME],

Just following up on my note about the free mortgage affordability calculator widget. I know you're busy — no pressure at all. Just wanted to make sure it didn't get lost in your inbox.

Quick recap: it's a free embeddable calculator that helps readers figure out their homebuying budget. No signup, no data collection, works on mobile.

Embed code if you want to check it out: [EMBED_CODE]

Thanks again,
Qasem Mohammed
QFINHUB
